steps.title: Recognize what no solution means
steps.content: A system of linear equations has no solution when the two lines are parallel. Parallel lines have equal slopes but different y-intercepts, so they never intersect.

steps.title: Compare slopes to find c
steps.content:
Both equations are in slope-intercept form $y = mx + b$:

First equation: $y = \frac{1}{2}x + 8$ has slope $\frac{1}{2}$

Second equation: $y = cx + 10$ has slope $c$

For the lines to be parallel, their slopes must be equal:
$$\frac{1}{2} = c$$
